stimulus: While excavating an ancient burial mound in Iowa in 1928, Ho-Chunk archaeologist Ellen Whitman uncovered her most significant find: a fragment of woven textile alongside copper ornaments. Whitman’s discovery was the first ______blank textile production in the Upper Midwest at least 1,500 years ago.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. The object of “was” is “first,” and the to-infinitive “to document” correctly modifies “first” (the first what? the first to document textile production).

Choices B, C, and D are finite verb forms that would create a comma splice or fail to complete the “the first ___” construction.
